recentTweets.text: Yesterday, I voted to block Trump’s plan to let AI decide whether Medicare will approve or deny your medical care. Every Senate Republican supported Trump’s scheme. Doctors should be deciding what care seniors need – not a computer program.
https://t.co/cibKMD3NwW

Trump has no idea how to end his reckless and expensive war in Iran, so now he is bombing civilian targets. This is a war crime. 
 
We already know how to end this war. Stop the bombing now. https://t.co/TEQELLJan0

RT @SunjeevBery: Thank you @SenMarkey for introducing the Slash the Pentagon Act: https://t.co/kZ2nGFRa9Y

Trump is using Pentagon funding…

Airport workers deserve good wages, quality health care, and dignity on the job. I’m proud to partner with @RepChuyGarcia on the Good Jobs for Good Airports Act to raise standards and put workers first.
 
Together with @SEIU, we’re fighting for good jobs at every airport. https://t.co/XPwQftLXoO

Smoke from Canadian wildfires is darkening skies and getting in our lungs across the state. With a record El Niño forecast for this year, we are looking at more wildfire smoke days ahead. The climate crisis is here and it does not stop at our borders. Stay safe, Massachusetts.

When my mother was diagnosed with Alzheimer’s, my father cared for her in our home for thirteen years. My provisions to expand services for family caregivers are what I wish my father had. I’m proud to have the full support of the Senate in reauthorizing the Older Americans Act.
https://t.co/hTbzMIrkb3

My new bill with @SenWarren & @RepLoriTrahan would secure millions in emergency water system grants, so when disasters strike like the burst pipe in Haverhill, communities aren’t left on the hook or in harm’s way. It’ll mean faster action to keep towns safer and businesses open.
https://t.co/3Rlcwkt18W

I'm working with state and local officials to address the wastewater overflow in the Merrimack River. Our communities can't shoulder this alone—that’s why Congress must pass my request for a robust water bill with billions of additional dollars for water and sewer infrastructure.

Today, the Supreme Court reaffirmed a fundamental promise of the 14th Amendment: if you're born in the United States, you're an American citizen. We have, and always will be, a nation of immigrants. Today we celebrate. Tomorrow, we keep fighting to protect our democracy.

Today, the far-right Supreme Court again cleared the way for Trump and MAGA Republicans to discriminate against the trans community. This decision tears trans athletes from their teams and the sports they love. We will keep fighting. Discrimination and hate will not win.
I will continue to fight alongside my partner @RepPressley in this fight for TPS as we push the Senate to act. We won’t stop until we protect all TPS holders.

https://t.co/udsKceaMLj

The Supreme Court ruled today that states can count timely postmarked ballots arriving after Election Day. Voting should be easy and accessible for all. As the Trump administration pushes to limit mail voting, we must keep fighting to protect every American's right to vote.
https://t.co/4e6fU2WF2A

I am heartbroken by the reporting out of Venezuela and praying for the hundreds of victims and families still searching for their loved ones. We must come together to provide relief for Venezuela in this devastating moment.
